_publications._publicationTitle: Use of machine learning to predict cognitive performance based on brain metabolism in Neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Group differences with medium effects were observed in measures of...visual working-memory (Corsi Block-Tapping Test forward and backward)
details: Forward task showed medium effect (38.13 ± 21.28 vs 45.75 ± 16.72, d=0.41) and backward task showed medium effect (20.38 ± 21.36 vs 36.81 ± 32.44, d=0.62) for visual working memory in NF1 vs controls
